# Northwoods Land Work
## Excavation, Hydro Seeding & Land Work Services in Northern Michigan

> Professional excavation, hydro seeding, site preparation, septic installation, land clearing, grading, drainage, and driveway services for residential, rural, and recreational properties across Northern Michigan.

Owner: Scott Cleland
Location: 3133 US Highway 31 S, Charlevoix, MI 49720
Phone: 734-716-0475
Website: https://www.northwoodslandwork.com

## Services
- Septic System Installation & Replacement
- Site Preparation & Foundation Excavation
- Hydro Seeding
- Shoreline Protection & Breakwall Installation
- Driveway Installation & Grading
- Land Clearing
- Demolition & Debris Removal
- Brush Hogging
- Drainage & Ditch Work
- Culverts & Water Control
- Trenching

## Service Area
Charlevoix, Petoskey, Boyne City, Traverse City, Gaylord, Cheboygan, and surrounding Northern Michigan communities.

## Hours
Monday – Friday: 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday: By appointment
Emergency/Storm Damage: Available 7 days a week

Licensed. Insured. Locally Owned.
